description: DEFAULT entry point for all slide conversion. Converts HTML to PPTX, then iterates per-slide — rendering, visually comparing against the source, fixing issues, and re-converting each slide until it matches or converges. Use for "convert these slides", "make a PowerPoint", "turn these into a deck", or any conversion request. Handles AI-generated HTML (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini) automatically. Always prefer this over slide-html-to-pptx.

results.query: convert these HTML slides to PowerPoint — the full workflow with validation and everything
make a PowerPoint from the HTML in slides/ — these came from ChatGPT so they probably need cleaning up

run this at best fidelity — I need multi-pass verification, this is going to the board
